case_title: LINDA GRECO VS. BORIS FELDMAN et al

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO DEPT 506 FILED BY DEFENDANT DE-LEVI, KRISTINA KIRILKINA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$59.50) SERVED NOV-15-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FELDMAN, BORIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRECO, LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE-LEVI, KRISTINA KIRILKINA DE-LEVI, FRANK $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, DEFENDANT BORIS FELDMAN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 *GRANTE - FULLY SATISFIED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS KRISTINA NAD FRANK DE-LEVI. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO BORIS FELDMAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-15-2010 AT 10:00AM.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
